title: Pale Birch leaves
description: A refined rework of birch leaves with enhanced detail and color balance, providing a cleaner and crisper aesthetic to your birch forests.
body:
Pale Birch Leaves

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db28fc019e112ac53050566a2838e60652c6f929_0.webp)

A redesigned birch leaf texture featuring a clean white hue that brightens up birch forests. These leaves offer a crisp and refined appearance, making them perfect for builds requiring a lighter, more elegant touch.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
